notes: Theme resolution and Set Theme execution are covered for empty input, named themes, JSON themes, suggestion errors, invalid JSON, and unknown themes.
Terminal-backed Shift execution covered by evaluator flow, but parity with upstream browser key actions is not fully demonstrated.
Default Line-scope wait behavior is covered; timeout and full upstream error parity still need broader verification.
Crystal now matches the upstream command function count and key set, and also has direct evaluator coverage for Wait and Shift execution.
Crystal covers the same theme-resolution scenarios as upstream command_test, plus evaluator-level Set Theme command behavior.
